content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09B","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Export the final data from the table as CSV file named J09B including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
8. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
9. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Export the final data from the table as CSV file named J09B including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
8. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
9. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOURS LIKE 'J09B%'

process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_talbe WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM decision_talbe d2 WHERE d2.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

CREATE TABLE J09B_joined AS SELECT t.*, eabgl.`Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.` as MR_Doc_No, eabgl.Installation, eablg.Meter Reading reason, eablg.`MR Reason - Text`, eablg.Scheduled MR Date, eablg.`Meter Reading unit`, eablg.`Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1` FROM J09B_temp t JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation

CREATE TABLE J09B_joined AS SELECT t.*, eablg.`Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.` as MR_Doc_No, eablg.Installation, eablg.[Meter Reading reason], eablg.[MR Reason - Text], eablg.Scheduled MR Date, eablg.[Meter Reading unit], eablg.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1] FROM J09B_temp t JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation

CREATE TABLE J09B_joined AS SELECT t.*, eablg.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.] as MR_Doc_No, eablg.Installation, eablg.[Meter Reading reason], eablg.[MR Reason - Text], eablg.Scheduled MR Date, eablg.[Meter Reading unit], eablg.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1] FROM J09B_temp t JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation

CREATE TABLE J09B_joined AS SELECT t.*, eablg.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.] as MR_Doc_No, eablg.Installation, eablg.[Meter Reading reason], eablg.[MR Reason - Text], eablg.Scheduled MR Date, eablg.[Meter Reading unit], eablg.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1] FROM J09B_temp t JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation

CREATE TABLE J09B_joined AS SELECT t.*, eablg.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.] as MR_Doc_No, eablg.Installation, eablg.[Meter Reading reason], eablg.[MR Reason - Text], eablg.Scheduled MR Date, eablg.[Meter Reading unit], eablg.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1] FROM J09B_temp t JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation
CREATE TABLE J09B_joined AS SELECT t.*, eablg.* FROM J09B_temp t JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation

CREATE TABLE J09B_joined2 AS SELECT j.*, nm.TITLE as NM_TITLE, nm.FORENAME as NM_FORENAME, nm.SURNAME as NM_SURNAME, nm.STREET as NM_STREET, nm.STREETNO as NM_STREETNO, nm.CITY1 as NM_CITY1, nm.CITY2 as NM_CITY2, nm.POST_CODE1 as NM_POST_CODE1, nm.EMAIL as NM_EMAIL FROM J09B_joined j JOIN net_master nm ON j.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR

CREATE TABLE J09B_joined3 AS SELECT j.*, sm.TITLE as SM_TITLE, sm.FORENAME as SM_FORENAME, sm.SURNAME as SM_SURNAME, sm.STREET as SM_STREET, sm.STREETNO as SM_STREETNO, sm.CITY1 as SM_CITY1, sm.CITY2 as SM_CITY2, sm.POST_CODE1 as SM_POST_CODE1, sm.EMAIL as SM_EMAIL FROM J09B_joined2 j JOIN sales_master sm ON j.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR

CREATE TABLE J09B_final AS SELECT j.[Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.] as `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, j.HAUS, j.ANLAGE, j.ME_MA_ID, j.EQUNR, j.HOUSE_NUM1, j.ENTSCHEIDUNG, CASE WHEN j.SM_TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN j.SM_TITLE ELSE j.NM_TITLE END as TITLE, CASE WHEN j.SM_FORENAME IS NOT NULL THEN j.SM_FORENAME ELSE j.NM_FORENAME END as FORENAME, CASE WHEN j.SM_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN j.SM_SURNAME ELSE j.NM_SURNAME END as SURNAME, CASE WHEN j.SM_STREET IS NOT NULL THEN j.SM_STREET ELSE j.NM_STREET END as STREET, CASE WHEN j.SM_STREETNO IS NOT NULL THEN j.SM_STREETNO ELSE j.NM_STREETNO END as STREETNO, CASE WHEN j.SM_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL THEN j.SM_POST_CODE1 ELSE j.NM_POST_CODE1 END as POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN j.SM_CITY1 IS NOT NULL THEN j.SM_CITY1 ELSE j.NM_CITY1 END as CITY1, CASE WHEN j.SM_CITY2 IS NOT NULL THEN j.SM_CITY2 ELSE j.NM_CITY2 END as CITY2, CASE WHEN j.SM_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN j.SM_EMAIL ELSE j.NM_EMAIL END as EMAIL FROM J09B_joined3 j

args.sql_query: SELECT `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_final

args.email: Please find attached the processed meter reading data for process J09B. The data has been prepared according to the specified rules and includes all required columns.

kwargs.content:
Process J09B has been executed successfully:

1. ✅ Created temporary table `J09B_temp` from `decision_talbe` with TOURS starting with 'J09B'
2. ✅ Added `ENTSCHEIDUNG` column to the temporary table
3. ✅ Applied decision rule: Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if less than 3 EQUNR per HAUS, otherwise "EVU" (4785 rows updated)
4. ✅ Joined with `eablg` table using ANLAGE = Installation
5. ✅ Joined with `net_master` and `sales_master` tables using EQUNR
6. ✅ Applied data priority logic: Sales data takes precedence over net data when available
7. ✅ Exported final data as CSV file `J09B.csv` with all 16 required columns (18,158 rows)
8. ✅ Sent email with attachment to meter.readings@evu.com (EVU team)
9. ✅ Cleaned up all temporary tables (J09B_temp, J09B_joined, J09B_joined2, J09B_joined3, J09B_final)

The process has been completed successfully and the data has been delivered to the EVU team.
